task_title: Resolve an ambiguous perturbation hit with one orthogonal follow-up

children.name: Reports the correct target, assay, result, and keep-drop decision
children.requirement: The final answer names TGT_C, uses ASY_PATHWAY, reports fail, and concludes drop.
children.grading_notes: Requires exact schema compliance and consistency with the single validation run.

children.name: Inspects the candidate overview
children.requirement: The agent inspects the candidate shortlist before acting.

children.name: Inspects the ambiguous target profile
children.requirement: The agent inspects TGT_C before selecting the follow-up.

children.name: Chooses the orthogonal pathway readout
children.requirement: The validation run uses ASY_PATHWAY on TGT_C.

children.name: Keeps the workflow to one validation run
children.requirement: The agent runs exactly one follow-up assay.
children.grading_notes: Measured from the count of run_validation_assay calls.

children.name: Explains the QC ambiguity and orthogonal non-support
children.requirement: The interpretation explains that the candidate was ambiguous because of a screen-versus-QC conflict and that the orthogonal assay did not support the hit.
children.grading_notes: Measured from interpretation keywords, not strict phrasing.

children.name: Uses a focused one-pass workflow
children.requirement: The trajectory stays within the focused follow-up call budget.
children.grading_notes: Full credit at or under the optimal tool-call budget.
